final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster (WeChat Official Account article cover) for a fragrance new product launch campaign titled "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香".

Style/medium: high-end editorial flat design, refined luxury aesthetic with subtle texture, inspired by Japanese fragrance brand visual identity
Composition: centered composition, title text as dominant focal element, generous negative space framing the center, balanced symmetry
Subject: headline text "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" rendered in elegant serif or brush-calligraphy typeface, prominently foregrounded; supporting visual motif of autumn botanicals (maple leaves, dried reeds, or amber glass bottle silhouette) as secondary element
Scene/backdrop: minimal abstract background suggesting autumn atmosphere — warm muted gradient or soft textured paper in ochre, burnt sienna, or dusty rose tones
Lighting/mood: soft diffused warm light, golden-hour warmth, calm and luxurious mood
Color palette: warm autumn tones — deep amber and burnt sienna as dominant, ivory or off-white as text contrast anchor, muted sage or charcoal as accent
Materials/textures: subtle paper grain or linen texture on background, smooth matte finish overall
Text (verbatim): "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: title text must be the largest, most legible element; layout must hold at 900×500 horizontal banner crop; no clutter around the text
Avoid: neon colors, busy backgrounds, drop shadows that obscure text, generic stock-photo collage, gradient overload, watermark
